---
title: "General_alogorithm"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{General_alogorithm}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup, echo=F}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
```

![](pngs/election_phases.png)

# Symbolic notation
## Definitions

## Formulas


# Fair election

- $x=\frac{a}{a+b}$
- $y=\frac{c}{c+d}$
- $\alpha=\frac{x}{Z}+\frac{Z\cdot y}{Z+1}$
- $Z=\frac{c+d}{a+b}$

$x$ and $y$ causes $\\alpha$

# Rigged election

1. $\alpha$
1. $x$
1. $y=formula$
1. $\zeta=altformula$

$\alpha$ and $x$ causes $y$

# The four phases of the general algorithm 

## Phase #1: Initiating the voter database

## Phase #2: Manifold Destiny

## Phase #3: Phantom-voters

## Phase #4: Updating the voter databse
